allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add 3D OBJ logo with debug overlay and optimized settings

- Loaded Tiltan logo from OBJ file (Asset 7.obj)
- Created TiltanLogo3D component with real-time rendering
- Added debug overlay showing scale, position, quaternion, color, opacity, roughness
- Configured camera: position [0, 1, 5], FOV 55
- Optimized lighting: ambient 0.5, directional 1.2, point lights
- Disabled shadows for cleaner rendering
- Material: green #22c55e, metalness 0.6, roughness 0.3
- Model scale: 0.15
- Floating animation with auto-rotation
- Installed three-stdlib for OBJ loading
- Fixed hydration warnings with suppressHydrationWarning

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
